entries.section: Best Leveling Professions for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Enchanting provides exclusive enchants for rings such as . Since Paladin Tanks will generally grind their way through several dungeons during leveling, it is pretty easy to start building up a stockpile of Enchanting materials from disenchanting unwanted greens and blues dropped by mobs and bosses, making the process of leveling Enchanting much more affordable.

entries.section: Best Leveling Professions for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Engineering provides Stamina-heavy trinkets, such as Goblin Rocket Launcher , as well as powerful consumables, like Super Sapper Charge and Mana Potion Injector . In later phases, it also provides access to powerful goggles, such as Tankatronic Goggles .

sections.heading: Best Leveling Professions for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Flask of Supreme Power : Significantly increases threat generation. This is particularly useful if having to hold aggro against T3-geared players in dungeons.

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Major Mana Potion / Super Mana Potion : Reduces downtime from drinking between pulls, allowing your group to clear dungeons much faster since the Tanks tend to be the one setting the group's pace. For those reading this during pre-patch, it is highly recommended to stockpile 500+ Major Mana Potion .

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Greater Stoneshield Potion : While not necessary for dungeon leveling, it is highly recommended for Tanks to stockpile these potions in preparation for tanking Heroic dungeons and Karazhan, as Ironshield Potion will be in short supply for the first few weeks of TBC.

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Greater Arcane Elixir : Increases threat generation.

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Mageblood Elixir : Increases passive mana regen, reducing downtime between pulls.

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Nightfin Soup : Increases passive mana regen, reducing downtime between pulls.

sections.heading: Best Leveling Consumables for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: Whether open world or dungeon leveling, mana management is key. When dungeon leveling, consider bringing classes that boost your overall mana or mana regeneration, such as Shadow Priests, Shamans, Balance Druids, and Mages. When dungeon leveling, if you have strong threat on your targets, consider whether you really need to cast more abilities. Having mana for the next pull is more important (will save more time) than doing slightly more damage but needing to drink between pulls.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: if you find yourself unable to dungeon level, it is highly recommended to level as Retribution in the open world, as Protection's single-target damage and mana management are very inefficient.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: 60-70: For leveling from 60-70 strictly through dungeon grinding, the following set of dungeons is recommended: 60-62: Hellfire Ramparts + The Blood Furnace . Be careful with the landmines dropped by Shadowmoon Technician in Blood Furnace!

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: 62-66: The Slave Pens (best exp rate) + Mana-Tombs + The Underbog .

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: 66-69: Sethekk Halls - You can also get Libram of the Eternal Rest from here!

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
entries.text: 69-70: The Shattered Halls + The Steamvault .

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Protection Paladin Tank in TBC Classic
